name: China Huirong Financial Holdings Limited
summary: China Huirong Financial Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides financial services to small and medium enterprises (SMEs), and individuals in the People's Republic of China. The company operates through four segments: Inclusive Finance Business Division, Technology Finance Business Division, Online Lending Intermediary Business Division, and Insurance Brokerage Business Division. It offers secured loans, such as real estate comprising of personal residential mortgage loans against properties, and personal property backed pawn loans, including gold, jewelry, diamonds, watches, bags, and suitcases; unsecured loans, such as equity interest backed, guaranteed, and other unsecured loans; and entrusted loans for short-term business turnover of SMEs and personal short-term capital turnover. The company also provides loan facilitation, factoring, and supply chain technology services, as well as money lending services. In addition, it operates Suzhou Qian Dai, an internet finance platform that acts as an intermediary agent between the borrowers and lenders; and offers insurance brokerage services, including property insurance, credit letter insurance, liability insurance, personal insurance, and others. Further, the company provides management and marketing consulting; pawnshop; micro-financing and guarantee; factoring; and technology development and consulting services. China Huirong Financial Holdings Limited was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Suzhou, the People's Republic of China.
